help.label: Personal service
help.title: Need help registering or have other questions?
help.text: Our representative visits your home free of charge to answer your questions or help you with the necessary steps.

why.label: Our commitment
why.title: Why us?
why.p1: As an approved provider of cleaning services for service vouchers, we are committed to offering optimal working conditions to our staff.
why.p2: We are aware that jobs in this sector are often precarious and informally carried out. By choosing our service voucher services, you can help guarantee job security for workers in our sector.

simplify.label: Our services
simplify.title: Simplify your life.
simplify.p1: At Brussels Net Services, we simplify your life with a team of skilled and enthusiastic professionals who can help lighten your household workload.
simplify.p2: We offer a full range of services including cleaning, laundry, grocery shopping and meal preparation. We accept payments via paper or electronic service vouchers and all administrative steps can be completed online.

office.label: Visit us
office.title: Prefer to stop by the office?
office.text: No problem — our office is easily accessible.

social.label: Stay connected
social.title: Our Social Media
social.text: Follow us to stay informed about our news and offers.

taches.title: Authorized Tasks
taches.subtitle: You can pay for household work carried out at your home or secondary residence.

tasks.title: Cleaning
tasks.desc: Full cleaning of your home or secondary residence according to your instructions.

tasks.title: Window washing
tasks.desc: Interior and exterior cleaning of your windows for a bright interior.

tasks.title: Laundry
tasks.desc: Washing, drying and caring for laundry in accordance with your habits.

tasks.title: Ironing
tasks.desc: Careful ironing of your clothes and household linen.

tasks.title: Mending
tasks.desc: Small repairs and mending of laundry to be ironed.

tasks.title: Meal preparation
tasks.desc: Preparation of simple, balanced meals according to your tastes and needs.

tasks.title: Small errands
tasks.desc: Local errands for your daily household needs.

taches.tips_heading: How to prepare for your housekeeper's visit

tips.title: Prepare the materials
tips.body: Make sure your housekeeper has all the cleaning materials and products she needs. No one knows your floors and the right products better than you.

tips.title: Give clear instructions
tips.body: Indicate which product to use on which type of floor, and always start with high surfaces — this avoids re-dusting what has already been cleaned.

tips.title: Tidy up beforehand
tips.body: We advise you to tidy your home before the intervention. The housekeeper can also tidy with or without your help, always following your instructions.

tips.title: Prepare a task list
tips.body: Indicate which room to vacuum, where to mop, and the priorities. Kitchen and bathroom often need more attention — your list helps optimise every hour.

demander.title: Looking for a housekeeper via service vouchers?
demander.subtitle: Submit your request online — we'll find the right person for you, quickly.

steps.title: Fill in the form
steps.body: Describe your needs, your availability and the type of tasks you'd like.

steps.title: We get back to you
steps.body: Our team reviews your request and calls you back within 48h to arrange an appointment.

steps.title: We introduce your helper
steps.body: We introduce you to a qualified housekeeper available in your neighbourhood.

form.message_placeholder: Home surface area, pets, access, special preferences...
form.privacy: Your data is used solely to process your request. No marketing.
form.success_text: Our team will contact you within 48h.

job.title: Join our team
job.subtitle: Brussels Net Services is looking for motivated domestic helpers. Enjoy stable employment and a respectful working environment.

perks.title: Stable CDI
perks.desc: Job security with an open-ended contract (CDI) from the start.

perks.title: Tailor-made schedule
perks.desc: A flexible schedule adapted to your private life and constraints.

perks.title: Proximity
perks.desc: We organize your assignments close to your home.

perks.title: Supportive team
perks.desc: Administrative and human support to accompany you every day.

job.steps_heading: How to become a domestic helper?

steps.title: Apply online
steps.body: Fill out the application form with your information.

steps.title: Interview
steps.body: We meet you to discuss your profile and expectations.

steps.title: Onboarding
steps.body: If your profile matches, we sign your contract and you start.

form.motivation_placeholder: Tell us in a few words about your motivations...

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.body: All content on this website (texts, images, logos, graphics) is the exclusive property of Brussels Net Services or its partners and is protected by Belgian and international copyright law. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior written authorisation.

sections.title: Personal data protection
sections.body: Data collected via contact forms is used solely to process your request. It is neither sold nor passed on to third parties. In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your data. To exercise this right, contact us at info@bns.brussels.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: This website uses anonymous analytical cookies (Vercel Analytics) to improve your browsing experience. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
sections.body: Brussels Net Services strives to keep the information published on this website up to date and accurate. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of this information. Use of the website is at the user's sole responsibility.
